---- Minecraft Crash Report ----
// You should try our sister game, Minceraft!

Time: 2024-04-01 14:00:00
Description: Attempting to load a Fabric mod on Forge

java.lang.ClassCastException: net.minecraft.world.item.ArmorItem cannot be cast to org.quiltmc.qsl.base.api.entrypoint.ModInitializer
    at net.minecraftforge.fml.javafmlmod.FMLJavaModLanguageProvider.lambda$loadParty$4(FMLJavaModLanguageProvider.java:95)
    at net.minecraftforge.fml.ModLoader.dispatchAndHandleError(ModLoader.java:202)

-- MOD forge --
-- MOD fabric-api 0.92.0 --
-- MOD sodium 0.5.8 --
-- MOD iris 1.7.0 --

-- System Details --
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1
Forge Version: 47.2.0
Note: fabric-api is a Fabric mod and cannot be loaded on Forge.
